summary:
product decision-makers in saas or app companies often lack the skills needed to analyze complex data, while analytics teams are too busy to offer instant support. 

clarityq puts an end to this by adding an ai-powered, free-text analytics layer that answers questions asked in plain-english, allowing all stakeholders to help themselves access any product data,  making better decisions and freeing analytics-teams to focus on strategic tasks.
headline: The First Free-Text Product Analytics for SaaS, games and PLG products

summary:
vantage discovery is a generative ai-powered saas platform that revolutionizes search, discovery, and personalization for retailers, publishers, brands, and more. vantage’s api enables apps to transform from keyword-based to semantic search where a user's meaning, intent and context are understood and used to deliver exceptional customer experiences. 

vantage apis are extremely fast, highly performant, and massively scalable. customers can integrate with them in 3 easy steps: 1) select your preferred llm, 2) upload your catalog/content, 3) hook the vantage api into your search box. vantage takes care of vector embedding, similarity search, retrieval-augmented generation, and all the operational work to make the developer experience plug-and-play. 

bridge the gap between your online presence and the real-world today with platform features like more-like-this, more-like-these™, recommendations, personalization, cross-sell, up-sell, multi-modal search, and more to deliver breathtaking c
headline: Discovery out of the box. Search transcended. For the AI age.
tags: ["artificial intelligence", "product discovery", "content discovery", "semantic search", "enterprise search", "personalization", "ecommerce", "generativeai", "saas"]

summary:
it all started with a challenge. we were enthralled by blockchain technology and its potential to change everything on the internet, but saw that it was hampered by terrible performance. we recognized pretty early on that just attempting to make a single faster blockchain wasn’t the best solution. to truly reach web-scale on ethereum, we would need to scale horizontally.

in 2022, we launched caldera. with our platform, projects can deploy a rollup with a single click, without an engineering team. we take care of deployment, customization, ongoing maintenance, and security, so projects can focus on building their vision. 

today, caldera is one of the fastest growing rollup ecosystems on ethereum. we’ve empowered web3 teams to customize and launch over 60 high-performance rollups across a number of app categories, and projects have free reign to launch their rollup on optimism, arbitrum, zksync, and polygon stacks.  

at present, the caldera ecosystem comprises 1.7 million unique walle
headline: The world's first modular blockchain platform

summary: discovering suitable funding for your business can pose a challenge, which is why many businesses rely on recommendations from their trusted associates to identify the most suitable options. at boundless, we recognize the demands on your time and the complexities involved in the funding process. that’s precisely why we’ve developed our platform – to streamline the process of connecting with and referring your clients to reputable lenders and simultaneously generating additional revenue for your business. our user-friendly client interface allows you to effortlessly showcase a variety of financial products from our partner lenders. we aspire to not only facilitate your financial transactions and product purchases but also contribute to the overall growth of your clientele’s businesses. try boundless today!
headline: Streamlining business funding applications

summary:
modelia is an ai platform that allows taking the basic images used by retailers to sell clothes and easily, quickly, and simply transforming them into high-quality images featuring ai-generated people of any age, gender, race, and size. just by dragging the image of a garment, describing the desired model in text, pressing the generate image button, and downloading it for use on any platform.

with modelia, marketers (in ecommerce, email marketing, digital marketing, branding, etc.) not only increase conversion rates by improving the visual presentation of products but also enhance the shopping experience by maximizing personalization of the interaction with the user: imagine being able to generate in real time a fully parameterized photo based on the user's ip, their race, their gender, or their preferences.
headline: Fashion Meets AI Magic! 🌟 Turn any flat lay, ghost mannequin, or model image into hyper-personalized AI visuals.

summary:
quoli is a comprehensive product reviews app for building real trust and boosting your online store conversion rates. easily collect and showcase product reviews, photos, videos, and ugc across your store. our platform offers customizable review widgets, automated review requests, and seamless management of both product and store reviews. with advanced features like nuggets, social ads, and conversion analytics, we empower merchants to engage and convert their customers better.

- collect reviews through automated requests, onsite forms, links, and qr codes.
- display star ratings and reviews in 25+ widgets, carousels, and trust badges.
- offer discounts for reviews, create nuggets, and transform them into social ads.
- import reviews from other apps, aliexpress, amazon, csvs, and sales channels.
- share reviews on socials and gain deeper insights about your customer profiles.
headline: Social proof and customer marketing platform for brands.
data:

- collect reviews through automated requests, onsite forms, links, and qr codes.
- display star ratings and reviews in 25+ widgets, carousels, and trust badges.
- offer discounts for reviews, create nuggets, and transform them into social ads.
- import reviews from other apps, aliexpress, amazon, csvs, and sales channels.
- share reviews on socials and gain deeper insights about your customer profiles.", "website": "quoli.io", "headline": "Social proof and customer marketing platform for brands.", "industry": "computer summary:
product decision-makers in saas or app companies often lack the skills needed to analyze complex data, while analytics teams are too busy to offer instant support. 

clarityq puts an end to this by adding an ai-powered, free-text analytics layer that answers questions asked in plain-english, allowing all stakeholders to help themselves access any product data,  making better decisions and freeing analytics-teams to focus on strategic tasks.
headline: The First Free-Text Product Analytics for SaaS, games and PLG products

summary:
vantage discovery is a generative ai-powered saas platform that revolutionizes search, discovery, and personalization for retailers, publishers, brands, and more. vantage’s api enables apps to transform from keyword-based to semantic search where a user's meaning, intent and context are understood and used to deliver exceptional customer experiences. 

vantage apis are extremely fast, highly performant, and massively scalable. customers can integrate with them in 3 easy steps: 1) select your preferred llm, 2) upload your catalog/content, 3) hook the vantage api into your search box. vantage takes care of vector embedding, similarity search, retrieval-augmented generation, and all the operational work to make the developer experience plug-and-play. 

bridge the gap between your online presence and the real-world today with platform features like more-like-this, more-like-these™, recommendations, personalization, cross-sell, up-sell, multi-modal search, and more to deliver breathtaking c
headline: Discovery out of the box. Search transcended. For the AI age.
tags: ["artificial intelligence", "product discovery", "content discovery", "semantic search", "enterprise search", "personalization", "ecommerce", "generativeai", "saas"]

summary:
it all started with a challenge. we were enthralled by blockchain technology and its potential to change everything on the internet, but saw that it was hampered by terrible performance. we recognized pretty early on that just attempting to make a single faster blockchain wasn’t the best solution. to truly reach web-scale on ethereum, we would need to scale horizontally.

in 2022, we launched caldera. with our platform, projects can deploy a rollup with a single click, without an engineering team. we take care of deployment, customization, ongoing maintenance, and security, so projects can focus on building their vision. 

today, caldera is one of the fastest growing rollup ecosystems on ethereum. we’ve empowered web3 teams to customize and launch over 60 high-performance rollups across a number of app categories, and projects have free reign to launch their rollup on optimism, arbitrum, zksync, and polygon stacks.  

at present, the caldera ecosystem comprises 1.7 million unique walle

summary:
modelia is an ai platform that allows taking the basic images used by retailers to sell clothes and easily, quickly, and simply transforming them into high-quality images featuring ai-generated people of any age, gender, race, and size. just by dragging the image of a garment, describing the desired model in text, pressing the generate image button, and downloading it for use on any platform.

with modelia, marketers (in ecommerce, email marketing, digital marketing, branding, etc.) not only increase conversion rates by improving the visual presentation of products but also enhance the shopping experience by maximizing personalization of the interaction with the user: imagine being able to generate in real time a fully parameterized photo based on the user's ip, their race, their gender, or their preferences.

summary:
quoli is a comprehensive product reviews app for building real trust and boosting your online store conversion rates. easily collect and showcase product reviews, photos, videos, and ugc across your store. our platform offers customizable review widgets, automated review requests, and seamless management of both product and store reviews. with advanced features like nuggets, social ads, and conversion analytics, we empower merchants to engage and convert their customers better.

- collect reviews through automated requests, onsite forms, links, and qr codes.
- display star ratings and reviews in 25+ widgets, carousels, and trust badges.
- offer discounts for reviews, create nuggets, and transform them into social ads.
- import reviews from other apps, aliexpress, amazon, csvs, and sales channels.
- share reviews on socials and gain deeper insights about your customer profiles.
headline: Social proof and customer marketing platform for brands.

procurement officers face outdated technology, lacking innovation and understaffed teams. these leaders are left spending too much time on compliance and box checking when they could be focusing  on helping organizations make the best sourcing decisions..

summary:
at deltagen, we believe ai should simplify your work—not complicate it. our platform is designed to help corporate development teams move faster, make better decisions, and focus on what truly matters.

with deltagen, you can automate tedious workflows, track deals seamlessly, and collaborate effortlessly with your team—all within a single, intuitive platform. from generating ic-ready outputs like one-pagers and valuation models to providing robust crm tools and integrated research features, deltagen is your one-stop shop for managing the entire m&a process.

unlike other ai solutions, we don’t just “get close” to the right answer. deltagen combines cutting-edge technology with a deep understanding of your job role to ensure accuracy, security, and efficiency at every step.

say goodbye to clunky chatbots, scattered tools, and endless manual tasks. with deltagen, you’ll have a user-friendly experience that empowers you to achieve more—faster.

join the companies transforming their work
headline: Make AI Work For You

summary:
ask sage is a gpt-driven platform that empowers government and commercial teams with data analysis, insights, and factual answers using openai gpt and gpt-like technologies. it accesses multiple data sources and provides real-time information, extraction, categorization, summarization, translation, and sentiment analysis in a natural language format. the platform supports multiple languages and offers conversational, engaging, and tailored responses.

by ingesting custom data, connecting to real-time queries, apis, and data lakes, sage augments results with real-time data and insights, allowing teams to focus on strategic initiatives. it offers various personas, such as developers, legal assistants, ghostwriters, and scientists, to help users achieve the fastest outcomes. sage assists with labor-intensive tasks like translations, content writing, code writing, and information analysis through a user-friendly interface.

trusted by over 2,000 government teams and 750 commercial companie
headline: Driving Outcomes
tags: ["gpt", "openai", "government"]

summary: vellum (w23) is a developer platform for building production-worthy applications on llms like openai’s gpt-3 or anthropic’s claude. use vellum to save hours on prompt engineering, iterate on prompts in production confidently, and continuously fine-tune for even better results.

summary: at govwell, we're helping 80,000+ local governments to serve their communities better with modern software. our integrated suite of products empower building, planning & zoning, code enforcement, and public works departments to expedite processes and simplify how citizens access essential services. from making it easier to start businesses to increasing the supply of affordable housing, we're honored to make our customers better at developing vibrant and safe communities.
headline: Modern software for local government

summary:
meet your home operating system.

home security should reinforce your peace of mind. you deserve a sanctuary, one that gives you the freedom to live your life with the people that matter most. that’s why we created something entirely new.

sauron is an autonomous platform for the perimeter of your home. it works discreetly in the background to reliably identify potential threats in all environmental conditions and it instantly recognizes who’s part of your inner circle.

we provide a bespoke white-glove service, ensuring that each client’s security platform is installed with precision and care, swiftly and without disrupting the comfort or aesthetics of their home.

to complement the technology, sauron leverages its intelligent response and intrusion suppression (iris) command center, staffed 24/7 by exceptionally trained agents with diverse backgrounds in law enforcement, military service, executive protection, and other critical security fields. the team builds relationships with loc
headline: Meet your home’s perception system.

summary:
lemony.ai by uptime industries is a secure, on-premise generative ai solution that delivers organization-wide trust, ownership, and transparency in ai.

its design paves the way for private, intelligent systems tailored for team collaboration and use within professional organizations. the solution embedded in the lemony box contains multiple pre-loaded ai models and a software layer, ensuring private, fast, and compliant ai capabilities. enjoy centralized control over ai with seamless integration, scalability, fixed-cost efficiency, and robust security through lemony.

our system enables you to scale up your content output and tap into those hidden gems in your video libraries—all with speed and ease. multiply your content output and quality while minimizing effort and maximum engagement from your buyers, sellers, prospects and customers.

summary:
collar networks is a global financial software company. 

we focus on creating scalable wealth management software, leveraging smart contract technology, to help institutions and high net worth individuals solve financial problems.

we believe in an open architecture future for the financial services industry in an increasingly global world. over time, we expect clients to continue to demand interoperability and compatibility between institutions, which our solutions provide natively.
headline: We build bespoke financial software for global clients.

summary:
omniloy is an ai saas that empowers every employee to analyze company data via chat. connect your data warehouse, applications and csvs with one click.

our proprietary cognitive framework ensures consistently accurate responses and unlocks a new level of analysis. omniloy eliminates the burden of ad-hoc data queries for the data team and enables revenue, operations and marketing teams to discover hidden insights on their data.
headline: Grasp insights from your sales and marketing data

summary:
colega ai is building the first ai agent that automates social media marketing for businesses, eliminating the need to hire expensive marketers.

using ai-powered chat, colega can perform tasks across your social media profiles and proactively build your online presence, so you can focus on what you do best: running your business.

the startup was founded by a veteran team of engineers and business leaders from companies such as uber, oracle, cookpad, standard chartered, and startups backed by y combinator and entrepreneur first.
headline: Your AI social media manager

summary: we will be the first group of students to build a walking humanoid robot that goes to space and does what an astronaut and a rover can and can not do. we're a dynamic team of purdue students revolutionizing space exploration with advanced humanoid robotics. join our vibrant community of engineers and enthusiasts pushing the boundaries of tech and space!
headline: Small Step for a Robot. Giant Leap for Robotics.

summary:
pinkdx is an early-stage company whose vision is to
positively impact the health of women throughout
their life journey.

we focus on addressing the medical problems that women uniquely face by applying sophisticated scientific approaches to resolve them and provide answers that have an immediate, positive impact on their lives. our first indication will focus on overcoming diagnostic challenges for women who present with general symptoms that could signal a gynecological cancer. 

led by a team of diagnostics industry veterans, pinkdx is privately held, with funding from prominent biotechnology investors, including catalio capital management, the production board, mountain group partners, byers capital and mayo clinic.
headline:
Positively impacting the health of women
throughout their life journey.

summary:
at vortexiq, we are driven by a fundamental belief in the transformative power of technology to enhance the lives of e-commerce retailers and their dedicated teams. we recognise these individuals' pivotal role in the global digital marketplace, and our mission is to empower them with innovative solutions that save time and resources and mitigate potential risks. by providing solutions to address e-commerce retailers' challenges, we aim to enable them to improve operational efficiency, grow profitability and scale up in an ever-evolving online landscape.

read about our rebrand, here https://saasvortex.vortexiq.ai

summary:
get hours back daily with bolo ai's new ai-powered knowledge platform built for the unique needs of the the energy industry. we ingest, structure, and deliver your most valuable asset - the knowledge inside your organization.

knowledge is fundamental to how the energy industry operates, yet creating, storing, and accessing knowledge is manual, tedious, and repetitive. with bolo ai, you can get hours back daily with our ai-powered knowledge management platform. bolo ai knowledge co-pilots use our proprietary energy specific large language models and other advanced ai techniques, allowing companies to increase productivity, save time from unplanned downtime, and improve the overall safety culture.

summary:
finopsly is the first ai-native finops platform designed to simplify multi-cloud and saas cost management. powered by its intelligent ai agent ‘fi,’ finopsly identifies deep wastage (50% more than csp tools), enables automation, and delivers actionable insights to unlock maximum roi.

by combining comprehensive visibility, intelligent recommendations, and proactive governance, finopsly empowers finance, product, and engineering teams to collaborate seamlessly and drive efficiency. its intuitive design accelerates finops maturity, enabling organizations to make smarter, data-driven decisions and strategically optimize every cloud dollar for growth and innovation.

finopsly isn't just about cost savings—it's about maximizing cloud value and driving sustainable, unified spend goals across your organization

summary: anarix is a retail-aware ai-driven marketplace optimization platform specializing in empowering agencies, brands, and sellers, to achieve unparalleled success on amazon and walmart. founded on the principles of innovation and customer-centricity, we provide sophisticated tools designed to supercharge advertising, enhance data analysis, and boost marketplace performance. our solutions include advertising management, amazon marketing cloud (amc), review sentiment analysis, listing optimization, comprehensive reporting capabilities, customizable visualization tools, and strategic insights that support scalable growth across multiple platforms. with anarix, you gain access to actionable data that drives decision-making and gain competitive advantages. join the myriad of businesses that trust anarix to navigate the complexities of online retail and thrive in the dynamic world of e-commerce.

summary: advisor.ai revolutionizes student success by uniting admissions, academic advising and career services on a single, ai-powered platform. we empower students to explore university-specific programs, majors and resources, allowing them to build customized pathways to realize their goals. by simplifying cross-departmental advising workflows, we enable institutions to deliver personalized support at scale, making student services more efficient and impactful.

making legal simple, transparent & people-first | schedule a demo today: fasteroutcomes.com/demo

the legal system is complex—but navigating it shouldn’t be. fasteroutcomes harnesses ai to streamline legal processes, ensuring efficiency, clarity, and a human-first experience.

🔹 for legal professionals – supercharge your practice with ai-powered document generation, instant case insights, predictive analytics, and seamless case management. enhance productivity without losing the personal touch.

🔹 for individuals – stay informed and in control with real-time updates and clear, accessible guidance throughout your legal journey.

backed by a team from meta, paypal, and uber ai, our founders bring deep legal expertise and a proven track record in scaling businesses to $100m+ and building b2b solutions for fortune 500 companies.

simplify legal. deliver fasteroutcomes. 

schedule a demo today! https://lnkd.in/gcghd3mn

summary:
do you struggle to take action on your customer data?

marketing and go-to-market teams face the challenge of turning vast amounts of data into actionable insights. you know your first-party data is valuable, but how can you unlock its full potential while enhancing it with the right third-party intelligence?

at icustomer, we understand the frustration of trying to make sense of complex data without the right tools

as an ai enabled co-intelligence startup, we’re dedicated to empowering marketing and gtm teams like yours to transform their operations and drive success. 

our decision intelligence & orchestration platform is designed to help you seamlessly integrate and enrich your customer data without needing a large tech stack or data operations teams.

enrich your first-party data with relevant third-party intelligence and signals to create a holistic view of your customers and prospects. 

improve your customer acquisition rates and engagement strategies with our smart decision en

marketing and go-to-market teams face the challenge of turning vast amounts of data into actionable insights. you know your first-party data is valuable, but how can you unlock its full potential while enhancing it with the right third-party intelligence?

at icustomer, we understand the frustration of trying to make sense of complex data without the right tools

as an ai enabled co-intelligence startup, we’re dedicated to empowering marketing and gtm teams like yours to transform their operations and drive success. 

our decision intelligence & orchestration platform is designed to help you seamlessly integrate and enrich your customer data without needing a large tech stack or data operations teams.

enrich your first-party data with relevant third-party intelligence and signals to create a holistic view of your customers and prospects.

revolutionizing the insurance landscape: the transformative role of ai in property and casualty insurance
we are a gen x artificial general intelligence company with branches in the usa and india. at gexagi, we leverage state-of-the-art technologies to revolutionize the property-casualty insurance sector. our duck creek and guidewire platform expertise enables us to deliver bespoke services that enhance insurance companie's operational efficiency and digital transformation efforts.
furthermore, we are at the forefront of research and product development. we utilize ai & ml to reimagine policy writing, ensuring our innovative solutions and cater to insurer's unique needs worldwide. our commitment extends into data analytics, where we harness the power of data to provide actionable insights, drive more intelligent decision-making, and unearth new opportunities for growth and optimization in the insurance landscape. through these focused efforts, we aim to empower insurers with the tools

summary:
revalgo, a revolutionary platform for b2b distributors and manufacturers that boosts your sales team's efficiencies by over 80% through artificial intelligence.  we automate complex sales orders, source non-stocks without human intervention, and create highly enriched product content using generative ai.

customers come to us when they are frustrated with their sales teams spending too much time on order entry and sourcing non-stock products while their ecommerce adoption is in single digits. they have also given up on existing solutions that merely convert a document sent by the customer using antiquated technologies. 

what sets us apart? our solution mimics a salesperson's order-building process to fulfill your customer's order, not just convert it.

our cutting-edge platform builds orders in your erp by:

     •	seamlessly handling orders from various sources, including email 
        conversations, pdfs, excel files, jpegs, handwritten notes, and text 
        messages 
     •	acc

summary:
unify is a go-to-market technology platform that automates powerful, end-to-end sales intelligence and engagement workflows through warm outbound. leveraging intent data and ai, unify handles everything from prospecting target personas to personalized engagement at scale. 

today, unify is generating qualified pipeline for industry-leading companies like lattice, airbyte, openphone, and arc. unify empowers sales, growth, and marketing teams to discover, segment, and engage with prospects all in one place.

summary:
click maint is a cmms (computerized maintenance management software). it's our mission to provide businesses across a variety of industries with a maintenance software that easy to use and implement and affordable. 

click maint is a complete cmms solution that allows businesses to streamline and track maintenance requests, work orders, preventive maintenance, assets, inventory, vendors and suppliers. our ease of use, price and customer support are what differentiates us from other cmms platforms.
headline: Maintenance Management Software, EASY as 1-2-3! Affordable CMMS that's easy to use and implement.

summary: put your content supply chain on hyperdrive. gradial lets digital marketing teams automate their content supply chain by helping create asset variants, execute on content updates, and create/migrate pages across channels. gradial can either provide a full-stack experience or meet marketers in their existing workflows by responding to tickets in tracking systems like jira or workfront and integrating with any cms/dam. digital marketing teams no longer need to worry about content authoring, activating their content across channels, and needing to break down high-level tasks into individual actions. instead, the gradial platform accomplishes that and finishes the operational task(s) behind the scenes so creatives can execute their visions at the speed of thought.
headline: Content Ops & Execution. At the Speed of Thought.

summary:
according to a mckinsey future of work report, 60% of jobs have at least 30% of the work that is repetitive and automatable. much of that work entails processing payments across finance and accounting departments, ticket resolution for customer support, and inputting lead management data for sales teams. 

orby provides a unique "observe, learn, and automate" end-to-end experience. orby observes a user’s activities, identifies repetitive work steps and automatically generates code that ultimately automates these tasks. moreover, orby works behind the scenes to continuously learn from human feedback, becoming smarter over time with no coding involved whatsoever.
headline: AI that can learn what you do and do it for you.

summary: entropy technologies pioneer’s transformative advancements in the healthcare landscape by harnessing the power of cutting-edge ai and analytics. at entropy, we're committed to reshaping the traditional healthcare paradigms through our proprietary natural health analytics api. our technology unlocks profound insights into health data, empowering individuals and businesses to make informed decisions for proactive well-being. we specialise in comprehensive blood test analysis, offering tailored reports that include health scores, risk assessments, personalised dos and don'ts, and a wealth of naturopathic remedies—all customisable to align with specific brands or practices. our solutions provide enhanced customer insights, expand portfolios, and streamline operations, fostering a future where preventive healthcare becomes intuitive, accessible, and empowering. with a focus on seamless integration, flexible pricing, and unparalleled support, we're dedicated to driving innovation and deliver

summary:
integrail’s mission is to simplify the creation, deployment, and management of multi-agent ai applications, making these technologies accessible for ai builders and users, and reducing the barriers to innovation. 

by advancing collaboration between humans and ai, we empower organizations to harness the collective intelligence of both, enhancing creativity and driving more effective solutions. 

we don't replace humans — we make them 10x more productive!

summary: we believe that access to reliable and affordable charging is the key to unlocking mass electrification and fighting climate change. at presto, we are building a software platform to power magical charging experiences for fleets, mobility providers, and businesses. for our charging partners, we strive to set in motion a positive flywheel of business demand and network utilization, helping expand charging for all.
headline: Presto works with fleets & mobility platforms to create charging experiences that are intuitive, reliable, and magical.

summary:
we're reimagining how learning happens when every student has their own classroom-connected ai mentor from kindergarten to career.

today that means we're building gpt-powered activities that make it easy for teachers to bring safe, managed ai experiences into the classroom. 

learning about the civil war? let every student interview abraham lincoln about the gettysburg address. want to know how every student is doing? run a quick pulse check and find out in seconds. writing essays? give every student their own writing coach.

every teacher gets a live dashboard of how their students are doing and feeling so they can orchestrate a classroom and school experience that works for every student.

schoolai is integrated with the curriculum & tools teachers and schools are already using, and brings school goals, teaching style, and parents' aspirations for their kids to truly personalize every student interaction – all in service of better learning for every kid.

founded in early 2023, we'r
headline: Powerful, managed, safe AI powered tools that bring K12 students, teachers, and school leaders closer together.

summary: hapax is unprecedented ai for the financial services industry. leveraging an exclusive partnership with cbanc, it utilizes 13 years of proprietary data, consisting of 20,000+ documents, 10,000+ hours of videos, and 230,000+ intimate conversations between bankers. this allows the product to deliver accurate and validated responses needed by the heavily regulated banks. via its product, hapax aims to bridge the information gaps between big banks and smaller banks by making access to complex information ubiquitous and immediate. to learn more and join the waitlist, visit https://www.askhapax.ai.
headline: Bridging the information gap for banks of all sizes.
